caption: A television news broadcast features a man wearing a light blue traditional garment and a red cap. He appears in a main video feed on the left and in a smaller inset portrait on the right. The inset is framed by a purple background with the text "ON THE PHONE," "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," "POLITICAL ANALYST," and "LAGOS." At the top left, a "plustv" logo is visible. A white banner across the bottom displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." In the top frames, a lower banner provides a link to "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" and a "WATCH ONLINE" prompt. In the bottom frames, this banner changes to "SUBSCRIBE" with a link to "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and a "FOLLOW US" section featuring social media icons and "PLUSTVAFRICA." The man remains in the same pose and attire across all frames, with only the bottom information banners shifting text.
